Speak to King Ozzy in the throne room. He asks you to find Sunny.
[Castle Region] Speak to Ozzy and Nymph in the throne room; agree to find Sunny. (Sunny here: Sunny bribes a prison guard with a date for a witch rumor.)
[Grassland] Cleanse the haunted mansion of a different ghost than Sunny's loot. (Sunny here: Sunny meets Steve and Cara again here; loots a haunted mansion.)
[Shrubland] Hunt the alpha-wolf den missed during Sunny's clear. (Sunny here: Sunny's party clears a wild wolf pack threatening the city.)
[Plains] Map all 20 mine maps and recover a foreman's lost ledger. (Sunny here: Sunny's party finds a maze-mine; needs a pickaxe to mine.)
[Forest] Visit grandparents, then track Sam who is robbing nearby farms. (Sunny here: Sunny visits her grandparents; Sam tries to steal and is dismissed.)
[Hills] Hunt the hairy beast and bring proof to the dwarven camp. (Sunny here: Sunny meets dwarves; rumor of a hairy beast they don't pursue.)
[River] Townsfolk now know about the cave -- clear the liches and the dracolich. (Sunny here: Sunny clears a beaver dam; finds a lich/dracolich cave and hides it.)
[Lake] Hunt the Ogre's surviving mate that has come back for revenge. (Sunny here: Sunny's party defeats an Ogre stalking the town for a sage's bounty.)
[Stream] Sabotage a saboteur trying to wreck the gnomish aqueduct. (Sunny here: Sunny helps gnomes finish a build project.)
[Marsh] Repay the giant by recovering its stolen heirloom from a fey hag. (Sunny here: Sunny climbs a rainbow and steals giant's coins.)
[Swamp] Help the witch brew an antidote for a child she cursed by accident. (Sunny here: Sunny finds the witch's hut; witch sends her to steal a stolen wand.)
[Wetland] Avenge the rival hobgoblins by hunting Sunny's allies. (Sunny here: Sunny helps a hobgoblin tribe defeat a rival.)
[Rain Forest] Clear the orc cave (warriors + mages + shaman) yourself. (Sunny here: Sunny visits half-elf treetop city; party splits over an Orc cave.)
[Karst] Reopen the dwarves' trade road by clearing 5 goblin sub-caves. (Sunny here: Sunny's party explores a sinkhole, dwarven city, then goblin caves.)
[Coast] Defend the wall during a coastal raid that would topple it. (Sunny here: Sunny helps the town raise a sea wall.)
[Beach] Free the villagers still warped by the sorcerer's lingering spells. (Sunny here: Sunny defeats a deviant sorcerer in a beach cave.)
[Sea] Charter a ship to the nearest island after proving seaworthiness. (Sunny here: Sunny helps build a breakwater and pier; hears of distant islands.)
[Ocean] Slay the hydra's brood that has surfaced since. (Sunny here: Sunny's party slays a hydra; party gets named magic gear.)
[Alpine] Triggered avalanche threatens town again -- divert it. (Sunny here: Sunny helps dig out the town after an avalanche.)
[Mediterranean] Re-enter the maze and recover loot the party left behind. (Sunny here: Sunny solves the druid's grand maze (virtues sacrifice illusion).)
[Tundra] Track the yeti chieftain to its lair beyond the walls. (Sunny here: Sunny helps the city defend against a yeti tribe.)
[Dry Lake] Break the curse and clear the haunted ruined city. (Sunny here: Sunny's party fails to break the curse of the haunted ruined city.)
[Desert] Track the gypsy who stole party's gold, then find Sunny's scorch trail. (Sunny here: Gypsies steal the party's gold; party splits; Sunny goes mad.)
[Mountain] Find the drow cave entrance; talk past the guard like Sunny did. (Sunny here: Sunny steals cloak of invisibility from Steve, finds drow cave.)
[Volcano] Complete one quest per dragon flight; final quest unites them. (Sunny here: Sunny enters the dragon caves (5N/5S types + central chambers).)
Return to the castle tower altar with all 24 region crystals.
